violations.description: HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the bar. Paper towels were replaced to correct the violation.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Walls in the kitchen noted with screw and nail holes in need of caulking. Floors in the warewashing area noted in need of cleaning/mopping. Noted very wet and with some food particles under the dish washing area.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Front and top of the cooler containing drawers and located under the griddle noted not clean.
